executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Focus on the Catalyst Story detail view at /project-hub/BAU/allwork?issue=BAU-5609. Test: (1) Description section edit/save/cancel and line-height, (2) Fix versions and Labels "None" fields have no black bar artifact, (3) Subtasks panel shows list-only (no board/toggle button), subtask CRUD (create, read status, update status, delete with confirm modal), (4) Workflow viewer modal opens from status pill, shows state diagram, closes, (5) Sidebar fields: Assignee, Reporter, Labels, Fix versions, Priority all render cleanly, (6) Navigation: open item from list, prev/next navigation arrows, close panel, deep-link URL, (7) Improve Story dropdown opens, (8) Activity section renders, (9) LinkedWorkItems section renders. Login credentials: use existing Supabase session at localhost:8080 — the app auto-authenticates in dev mode. If login is needed, use email vikramataol@gmail.com.
